nasb.text: Now that you are broken by the seas In the depths of the waters, Your merchandise and all your company Have fallen in the midst of you.

esv.text: Now you are wrecked by the seas, in the depths of the waters; your merchandise and all your crew in your midst have sunk with you.

cnv.text: 如今你在深水的地方， 被海水沖破； 你的商品和所有在你那裡聚集的人， 都沉下去了。

ccb.text: 然而，如今你在汪洋中被海浪击碎， 你的货物和人民都一同沉没了。
